text: Several key risks temper our outlook. Revenue growth has shown notable volatility across 2025 quarters, ranging from -0.93% in Q1 to 7.22% in Q2 before moderating to 0.91% in Q3, suggesting top-line performance may remain inconsistent. Additionally, regulatory developments in the competitive payments landscape present uncertainty, particularly the Visa-Mastercard proposed settlement over interchange fees announced on November 12, 2025, which could potentially impact rewards credit card dynamics across the industry. The company operates in the highly regulated financial services sector, entailing ongoing compliance and operational execution risks.

issues.explanation: Chunk C031 is cited in support of this paragraph, but its content (American Express Small Business Saturday grants program announcement) does not support any claim made in the paragraph. The paragraph discusses revenue growth volatility and Visa-Mastercard regulatory settlement - C031 contains no information relevant to either topic. Only C030 supports the Visa-Mastercard settlement claim.
issues.recommended_fix: Remove C031 from the cited chunk references for this paragraph. Only C030 (Visa-Mastercard settlement news) and K001 (revenue growth calculations) are relevant to the claims made.
